channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. The Chinese Lens Boom Continues With a Flood of New Releases  PetaPixel
  2. All images of the upcoming new Viltrox lenses!  SonyAlphaRumors
  3. Viltrox 75mm f/1.8 EVO for Fujifilm X – Additional Images and Shipping in June  Fuji Rumors
  4. All the new lenses revealed at the 2026 China P&E Imaging Show  Digital Camera World
  5. Viltrox 35mm f/1.2 Lab II: Sharpest Budget 35mm Lens You Can Buy Right Now?  Fstoppers

item.title: Zagato 01 Debuts As All-New Ford 5.2L Supercharged V8 Hypercar - Ford Authority
item.description:
1. Zagato 01 Debuts As All-New Ford 5.2L Supercharged V8 Hypercar  Ford Authority
  2. Hypercar Horoscope: You Can't Afford This Custom 900-HP V-8 Capricorn 01 Zagato Prototype  Car and Driver
  3. Behold The Supercar That Laughs At Every Red Ferrari On The Road  CarBuzz
  4. Capricorn’s $3.4 Million Analog Hypercar Gets A One-Off All-Red Makeover  Autoblog
  5. The Capricorn 01 Zagato Tutto Rosso Brings Automotive Theatre To Villa D’Este  Luxurious Magazine

item.title: Lenovo releases new 16-inch laptop with 96 GB LPCAMM2 and AMD processors sooner than expected - Notebookcheck
item.description:
1. Lenovo releases new 16-inch laptop with 96 GB LPCAMM2 and AMD processors sooner than expected  Notebookcheck
  2. Lenovo Completes 2026 ThinkPad Portfolio with Expanded AI PCs for Mainstream Enterprise Computing  Lenovo StoryHub
  3. Lenovo Announces the ThinkStation P4 with AMD Ryzen PRO 9000 Series Processors  TechPowerUp
  4. The Value-Tier ThinkPad Where Intel and AMD Finally Tied  The Gadgeteer
  5. Lenovo releases cheaper 16-inch ThinkPad internationally with 120 Hz display  Notebookcheck

item.title: Report: Apple to upgrade Genmoji in iOS 27 with new automatic suggestions - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. Report: Apple to upgrade Genmoji in iOS 27 with new automatic suggestions  9to5Mac
  2. Apple’s Genmoji to get smarter in iOS 27 with automatic emoji ideas  The Times of India
  3. Genmoji in iOS 27 will use what you type and what's in Photos for suggestions  AppleInsider
  4. Genmoji on iPhone will get an update with iOS 27 to make it more appealing for casual users  PhoneArena
  5. Apple iOS 27 uses on-device AI for GenMoji suggestions  NewsBytes
